title: Global ID Registry
description: Stable ID registry for claim-based research pipeline artifacts.

source_ids.description: Stable mapping from source identity keys to source_id values.

claim_ids.description: Stable mapping from claim content hashes to claim_id values.

section_ids.description: Stable mapping from normalized planner section names to section_id values.

content_hashes.description: Stable reverse lookup from normalized content hashes to canonical artifact IDs.
